creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sorry it took some time for this to get attention.  if_bridge should mask MEXTPG if some members don't support it: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D47294

This is basically equivalent to your workaround.

I also have a patch which enables MEXTPG for tap interfaces: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D47295
